justifications.clarity: Tables and deepdive boxes break up dense technical content effectively; all technical terms defined on first use.
justifications.rigor: Six BibTeX citations support all major empirical claims (adoption stats, productivity gains, multi-agent foundations); tool-behavior descriptions match official May 2026 documentation.
justifications.completeness: All 10 planned sections covered; every major Claude Code feature (MCP, hooks, skills, Workflow, Agent Teams, scheduled routines) addressed; finance use cases are concrete and actionable.
justifications.pedagogy: Seven measurable learning objectives stated upfront; Workflow code example annotated with runtime commentary; concrete end-to-end worked example (Example A.1) demonstrates the full skill pipeline for a finance researcher.
justifications.style: Consistent with book LaTeX conventions throughout; uses context and deepdive environments appropriately; British English spelling unified (analyse, behaviour, synthesise).
